public_practice_name: Sheryl Leipold DDS PC (dba Signature Smiles of Homer Glen)
owner_operator_stated: Dr. Sheryl Leipold, DDS is the founding dentist/owner; the practice bears her name.
notes: Corroborated via exact phone number match (708-645-0505), which appears consistently on the practice's own indexed pages and across directory listings under the practice name. Direct WebFetch of drsherylleipold.com repeatedly failed with a TLS hostname-mismatch error (ERR_TLS_CERT_ALTNAME_INVALID), so content here is drawn from search-result snippets of the site's own pages (contact-us, homepage), not a directly loaded page -- flagging for transparency. Street number in directories is inconsistent (15927 vs 15776 S Bell Rd) though phone and practice name are consistent throughout, most likely directory data-entry variance rather than a different entity. The vendor_website_hint 'Artisticdentistry-Pc.Com' was checked and belongs to a DIFFERENT, unrelated practice (Artistic Dentistry / Dr. Joel Akroush, 14811 S Founder's Crossing, 708-301-6060) -- rejected, not corroborated for this record.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Reem Shafi, DMD is the primary owner of Eco Dental, which now operates under this name at this address/phone; the site makes no reference to the record's named entity 'Ashton Dental PC.'
notes: SUCCESSOR CONFLICT: the record's named entity 'Ashton Dental PC' no longer operates at 14403 S Bell Rd, Homer Glen. The exact address AND exact phone number (708-966-4018) now belong to Eco Dental, owned by Dr. Reem Shafi, DMD -- a different, unrelated practice per the site's own content (no mention of Ashton Dental). Eco Dental has an active hiring page with multiple current openings (call center rep, front desk, assistants, hygienists, treatment coordinators, office manager); apply via vsamdani1@gmail.com.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Sinan Razzak, DDS is Founder/President of the 12-location Dental Town Chicago group; Dr. Dina Alqawasma is listed as the primary dentist at the Summit location.
notes: Multi-location group: Dental Town Chicago operates 12 offices across the Chicago area (Albany Park, Archer, Avondale, Bedford Park, Berwyn, Burbank, Cicero, Little Village, Melrose Park, Oakbrook, Pulaski, Summit) under founder Dr. Sinan Razzak. This Summit page's address (5836 S. Harlem Ave. #200, Summit, IL 60501) matches the record exactly. The record's listed phone (708-863-2000) does NOT match the site's listed Summit phone (708-215-4000); a quoted search for the record's phone number returned only unrelated/inconclusive results (no other dental practice), so this is treated as a stale/incorrect vendor phone number rather than an ownership conflict -- address match is the corroborating signal. No careers/hiring page found on the group site.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Reem Shafi, DMD is listed as the practice's dentist; the careers page mailing/apply address ties the practice to a small network operating under the domain tworiversdental.com.
notes: Address (1137 N. Eola Rd Suite 109, Aurora, IL 60502) matches the record exactly. The site's listed phone (630-898-2688) does NOT match the record's listed phone (630-999-9637); a quoted search for the record's phone number returned no identifiable owner, so treated as a stale/secondary vendor number rather than an ownership conflict -- address match is the corroborating signal. Careers page lists 2 current openings (Dentist, Health Informatics Specialist), but both postings direct applicants to a Naperville, IL mailing address (1730 Park Street Suite #106) and an @tworiversdental.com email, suggesting Ashton Dental is one location within a small multi-practice network rather than confirmed to be hiring specifically for this Aurora address.
